name: Beer Griddlecakes with Pilgrim Syrup
recipeInstructions: For the batter, mix dry ingredients. Beat egg with oil and molasses. Add to dry ingredients along with beer. Stir lightly until blended. The batter will be slightly lumpy and thick. Using about 2 tablespoons of batter for each griddlecake, spoon onto a hot, very lightly greased griddle. Spread with the back of a spoon to form circles about 3 1/2 to 4 inches in diameter. Cook until browned, turning once. For the syrup, combine ingredients in a saucepan and boil for a few minutes. Makes 2/3 cups. Serves 20 (or 4-5 servings).
